definition: 2-4 month directional changes in institutional price delivery. The market operates in quarterly cycles tied to fiscal reporting, option expiration, and institutional rebalancing. Quarterly shifts mark the transition from one macro trend to the next — they are the LARGEST-SCALE directional signal in ICT methodology.
depends_on: IPDA (quarterly shifts occur when IPDA 60-day range is exhausted)
market_philosophy (institutional delivery operates on quarterly schedules)
feeds_into: market_structure (quarterly shift changes the HTF bias for weeks/months)
daily_bias (new quarterly direction overrides all shorter-term analysis)
seasonal_tendencies (quarterly shifts often align with seasonal patterns)
related_to: dealing_range (new quarterly range establishes new dealing range extremes)
opening_gaps (NMOG at quarter boundaries = highest significance)

Q1_jan_mar.typical_pattern: January sets the annual high or low. February consolidates. March trends.
Q1_jan_mar.institutional_driver: New year allocations, portfolio rebalancing, fiscal year start for many funds
Q1_jan_mar.watch_for: January range often defines the year's extremes — mark Jan high/low as annual DOL

Q2_apr_jun.typical_pattern: April starts strong (tax season flows). May reversal common ('sell in May'). June sets up Q3.
Q2_apr_jun.institutional_driver: Tax deadline (Apr 15), Q1 earnings, mid-year rebalancing
Q2_apr_jun.watch_for: April NMOG is often significant — sets Q2 directional tone

Q3_jul_sep.typical_pattern: July continuation from Q2. August low liquidity. September volatile reversal.
Q3_jul_sep.institutional_driver: Summer trading desks thin. September = back-to-school for institutions.
Q3_jul_sep.watch_for: September is historically the worst month for equities — expect bearish shift

Q4_oct_dec.typical_pattern: October bottom (if bearish Q3). November-December rally ('Santa rally').
Q4_oct_dec.institutional_driver: Fiscal year-end positioning, holiday flows, tax-loss harvesting
Q4_oct_dec.watch_for: October reversal is the most reliable quarterly shift of the year

weekly_close_analysis.method: Analyze 8-12 weekly closes. When 3+ consecutive weekly closes reverse the prior quarterly direction, a shift is confirmed.
weekly_close_analysis.confirmation: New quarterly low/high established + weekly structure break (CHoCH on W1)
weekly_close_analysis.false_signal: 1-2 weeks of reversal may be a pullback, not a shift. Need 3+ weeks.

ipda_range_test.method: When price reaches the IPDA 60-day range extreme and reverses with displacement
ipda_range_test.logic: IPDA 60-day range represents the quarterly delivery range. Testing its extreme = potential shift.

monthly_candle_pattern.method: Monthly candle that engulfs the previous month in the opposite direction
monthly_candle_pattern.confirmation: Monthly CHoCH = highest-confidence quarterly shift signal

trading_rules.rule_1: Trades aligned with the current quarterly direction have 15-20% higher win rate
trading_rules.rule_2: Counter-quarterly trades should be sized at 50% or less (Grade B max)
trading_rules.rule_3: During the first 2 weeks of a new quarter, wait for direction confirmation before trading
trading_rules.rule_4: Quarterly shift + seasonal alignment = highest-confidence macro setup
trading_rules.rule_5: Don't fight a confirmed quarterly shift — even if daily analysis says otherwise

crypto_application.note: Crypto doesn't follow fiscal quarters exactly, but institutional crypto (CME futures, ETFs) does
crypto_application.btc_quarterly: BTC has historically made major moves in Q1 and Q4 (halving cycles, ETF flows)
crypto_application.watch: CME BTC/ETH futures expiration dates align with quarterly boundaries

bridge_integration.detection: Analyzes weekly closes from H4 data. Identifies when 3+ consecutive weekly closes reverse the prior quarterly direction.
bridge_integration.auto_injection: Quarterly shift detected → QShift_BULLISH/BEARISH(confirmed/developing) added to advanced_factors → injected into Claude prompt.
bridge_integration.bias_override: Confirmed quarterly shift (3+ weeks) MUST align with all trades. Developing shift (2 weeks) downgrades counter-trades by 1 grade.
bridge_integration.score_impact: Trade aligned with quarterly shift = +5 macro confidence. Counter-shift = -5 and max Grade B.
bridge_integration.risk_adjustment: Counter-quarterly trades get 50% risk reduction automatically. Aligned trades can use full risk allocation.
